title: Prevent duplicate user registration
description:
Repository: https://github.com/MuhammedSenn/demo-user-service-python
Branch: main

Requirement:
register_user in registration.py currently allows the same email to register more than once. Prevent duplicate registrations: if the email is already registered, raise ValueError with message 'User already registered'. A first-time registration must keep working as before.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Registering a new email succeeds and returns the registered status
- Registering an already-registered email raises ValueError with message 'User already registered'
- Add or update unit tests in test_registration.py covering both cases
